note: Pin by immutable commit SHA (`ref`). This is v1.2.0 content (the userinfo-bypass fix this app reported), pinned to the `main` commit it landed on because v1.2.0 was NOT YET TAGGED at pin time. Re-pin to the v1.2.0 tag's commit once it is cut: `make contract-pull REF=v1.2.0` (pull-contract.sh peels the tag to its commit SHA). `tag` is informational. The contract content (contract.json + CONTRACT.md) is NOT committed here: GitHub is the single source of truth. It is fetched from upstream@ref at wheel-build time (hatch_build.py) and by the scripts/Makefile, and every fetch is verified against the per-file `sha256` digests below (build/pull fails on mismatch). nix/package.nix must pin the same SHA in its `rev` (CI asserts this).
